skills.name: http_request
skills.description: Make an HTTP request with a stored secret injected as a header or query param — the model never sees the credential value.

skills.name: run_command
skills.description: Run a subprocess with secrets injected as environment variables — the model specifies the command but credentials stay hidden.

skills.name: list_secrets
skills.description: List secret names currently in scope with policy summaries (counts only) — no values, no hostnames, no patterns exposed.

skills.name: scan_env_requirement
skills.description: Scan a project directory for environment variable requirements and check which are satisfied by stored secrets.
